data.biography: 兰西雅，1998年12月22日出生于湖北省恩施市，中国内地影视女演员、流行乐歌手，毕业于武汉大学戏剧表演系
data.name: 兰西雅

data.biography: Lan Xiya (English name: Lancia), born in Hubei, is a Chinese actress. She graduated from Wuhan University majoring in Drama, Film, and Television acting. In August of 2020, Lancia made her acting debut in "With You".
data.name: Lan Xiya

data.biography: 蘭西雅，1998 年 12 月 22 日出生於湖北省恩施市，中國內地影視女演員、流行樂歌手，畢業於武漢大學戲劇表演系
data.name: 蘭西雅
